name: agent-order
description: The Order of the Agents - multi-model deliberation for consequential decisions. Anonymized critique, aggregator synthesis, rubric-scored review, and shareable HTML decision artifacts.
author: Bilal Tahir

scripts.check: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-order.js --help && node dist/bin/agent-order.js check --config examples/mock.config.yaml
scripts.demo: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-order.js "Plan a saved-search feature for a project management app. Include UX, data model, API, rollout risks, and acceptance criteria." --config examples/mock.config.yaml --out .tmp/demo-runs --max-turns 12
scripts.demo:prd: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-order.js prd ./docs/evals/scenarios/prd/saved-search/scenario.md --config examples/mock.config.yaml --out .tmp/demo-runs --max-turns 14
scripts.smoke:real: npm run build && node dist/bin/agent-order.js "Plan a saved-search feature for a project management app. Include UX, data model, API, rollout risks, and acceptance criteria." --agents codex,claude --out .tmp/real-runs --max-turns 3 --human-input never --no-final-review
